query:
SELECT n.nspname AS schema_name,
           c.relname AS object_name,
           CASE c.relkind
               WHEN $1 THEN $2
               WHEN $3 THEN $4
               WHEN $5 THEN $6
               WHEN $7 THEN $8
               WHEN $9 THEN $10
               ELSE $11
           END AS object_type
    FROM pg_class c
    JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
    WHERE c.relkind IN ($12, $13, $14, $15, $16)
      AND n.nspname NOT IN ($17, $18, $19)
    ORDER BY n.nspname, c.relname
COPY  ( SELECT * FROM "public" . "interactive_submissions" ) TO STDOUT WITH (FORMAT CSV, HEADER true)
